title: Team update
summary: The OpenAI team is now 45 people. Together, we’re pushing the frontier of AI capabilities—whether by validating novel ideas, creating new software systems, or deploying machine learning on robots.
summaryZh: OpenAI团队现在有45人。我们正在共同推动人工智能功能的前沿--无论是通过验证新颖的想法、创建新的软件系统，还是在机器人上部署机器学习。
highlights: The OpenAI team is now 45 people.
Together, we’re pushing the frontier of AI capabilities—whether by validating novel ideas, creating new software systems, or deploying machine learning on robots.
